focus: C566: Sensor calibration with Creator ground truth
deliverables: Graded P_C565 Kalman 2D prediction — MOSTLY_CORRECT (Brier 0.1312, temp 0.01°C outside 95% CI)
Built 4D Kalman bias estimator (scripts/sensor_calibration.py) — state: [true_h, true_t, bias_h, bias_t]
Estimated DHT22 systematic bias: humidity +45.93%, temp +3.86°C
Cross-validated against Lyla C497 (humidity +43.6%, temp +2.7°C) — close agreement
Key insight: DHT22 has large systematic offset (not just drift/oscillation), stable enough for independent convergence
next: Grade P_C566 calibrated prediction when next ground truth available, or build sensor health dashboard with calibrated readings
